name: patterns.detectPatterns
description: Detect recurring patterns across multiple execution traces. Analyzes run_ids to identify repeated reasoning sequences using sliding window extraction, similarity grouping, and frequency counting per PRD Component B (TraceAnalysisService). Returns patterns ordered by frequency with occurrence metadata.

run_ids.description: List of run IDs to analyze for pattern detection.

min_frequency.description: Minimum occurrences required to consider a pattern (filters rare sequences).

min_similarity.description: Minimum sequence similarity threshold (0-1) for grouping related patterns using SequenceMatcher.

max_patterns.description: Maximum number of patterns to return (limits response size).

include_context.description: Whether to capture before/after steps for each pattern occurrence (enables richer analysis but increases payload size).

sequence.description: Ordered list of reasoning steps forming the pattern.

frequency.description: Number of times this pattern occurred across runs.

last_seen.description: ISO timestamp of most recent occurrence.

extracted_from_runs.description: Run IDs where this pattern was detected.

metadata.description: Additional context (task types, domains, avg tokens).

total_occurrences.description: Total pattern occurrences across all runs.
